hooks.rewakeSummary: HANDOFF.md needs updating before session ends
hooks.rewakeMessage: HANDOFF.md hasn't been updated in this session. Please update it now with: current goal, what was just completed, what's in progress, next 3 steps, important files, and any blockers or risks. Keep it brief and operational — just enough for the next agent to pick up without rereading the conversation.
hooks.command: HANDOFF=$(find "$PWD" -maxdepth 3 -name 'HANDOFF.md' 2>/dev/null | head -1); [ -z "$HANDOFF" ] && exit 0; LAST=$(stat -f %m "$HANDOFF" 2>/dev/null || stat -c %Y "$HANDOFF" 2>/dev/null); NOW=$(date +%s); [ $((NOW - LAST)) -gt 300 ] && exit 2; exit 0
